asset._description: Core asset type definitions with technical and operational parameters. All parameters are indexed on only the asset name.

asset.description: Unique identifier with the name of the asset.

capacity.description: Capacity for one unit of the asset (is therefore multiplied by number of existing plus number of invested assets).

consumer_balance_sense.description: Is the sense of the consumer balance constraint, equal to, greater than or less than.

discount_rate.description: e.g. 0.05 is 5 %. discount rate for the annuity calculation.

economic_lifetime.description: Economic lifetime of the unit for annuity calculation.

energy_to_power_ratio.description: Fixed ratio between the energy storage capacity [MWh] and the discharge/charge capacity [MW] when `storage_method_energy = 'use_fixed_energy_to_power_ratio'`.

investment_integer.description: Whether investment decisions are using integer variables.

investment_integer_storage_energy.description: Whether investment for storage energy is integer or continuous. It only applies when `storage_method_energy = 'optimize_storage_capacity'`.

is_seasonal.description: Whether seasonal storage (e.g., hydro) or not (e.g., battery)

max_ramp_down.description: Maximum ramping down rate as a portion of the capacity of asset.

max_ramp_up.description: Maximum ramping up rate as a portion of the capacity of asset.

min_operating_point.description: Minimum operating point or minimum stable generation level defined as a portion of the capacity of asset.

ramping.description: Whether asset has ramping constraints or not.

storage_method_energy.description: Storage energy investment method. See constraints for possible values.

technical_lifetime.description: Technical lifetime of the unit to determine for how long the capacity is considered from the commission year.

unit_commitment.description: Whether asset has unit commitment constraints or not

unit_commitment_integer.description: Whether the unit commitment variables are integer or not.

unit_commitment_method.description: Which unit commitment method to use (null/empty/missing -> no unit commitment method).

use_binary_storage_method.description: Whether to use an extra binary variable for the storage assets to avoid charging and discharging simultaneously (null/empty/missing -> no binary).

asset_both._description: Contains asset parameters that are indexed by the asset name and BOTH the commission_year (aka the year the asset is built) and the milestone_year (the year of investment and operation decisions).

asset.description: (Table Index) Name of the asset. Same as the one in the `asset` table.

commission_year.description: (Table Index) Year of commissioning the asset.

decommissionable.description: Whether or not the asset can be decommissioned.

milestone_year.description: (Table Index) Year of investment and operation decisions in the optimization.

asset_commission._description: Contains asset parameters that are indexed by the asset name and the commission_year (aka the year the asset is built).

asset.description: (Table Index) Name of the asset. Same as the one in the `asset` table.

commission_year.description: (Table Index) Year of commissioning the asset.

fixed_cost.description: Fixed annual cost for the asset capacity.

fixed_cost_storage_energy.description: Fixed annual cost for the asset storage capacity

investment_cost.description: Investment cost for the asset capacity.

investment_cost_storage_energy.description: Investment cost for the asset energy storage capacity.

investment_limit.description: Maximum capacity for the asset investment. If the initial value is null, empty, or missing, it will be no limit.

investment_limit_storage_energy.description: Maximum capacity for the asset storage investment. If the initial value is null, empty, or missing, it will be no limit.

storage_charging_efficiency.description: Storage asset charging efficiency as a multiplier for the sum of all inputs of the asset.

storage_discharging_efficiency.description: Storage asset discharging efficiency as a multiplier for the sum of all outputs of the asset.

storage_loss_from_stored_energy.description: [e.g. 0.01 means 1% every hour] Loss of stored energy over time.

asset_milestone._description: Contains asset parameters that are indexed by the asset name and the milestone_year (the year of investment and operation decisions).

asset.description: (Table Index) Name of the asset. Same as the one in the `asset` table.

initial_storage_level.description: The initial storage level at the beginning of the optimization. The final storage level needs to be above this initial value. If the initial value is null, empty, or missing, it will be optimized using a cycling constraint that links the last period to the initial period.

investable.description: Whether there is an investment variable created for the asset or not.

max_energy_timeframe_partition.description: The maximum amount of energy across the timeframe (e.g., a year) that the asset must produce. If the initial value is null, empty, or missing, it will be no limit.

milestone_year.description: (Table Index) Year of investment and operation decisions in the optimization.

min_energy_timeframe_partition.description: The minimum amount of energy across the timeframe (e.g., a year) that the asset must produce. If the initial value is null, empty, or missing, it will be no limit.

peak_demand.description: Value that multiplies the demand profile time series.

storage_inflows.description: Value that multiplies the inflow profile time series.

units_on_cost.description: Cost of keeping unit online for one hour or the objective function coefficient on `units_on` variable. e.g., no_load cost or idling cost

assets_profiles._description: Links time-series profiles (availability, demand, inflows, etc.) to assets.

asset.description: (Table Index) Name of the asset. Same as the one in the `asset` table.

commission_year.description: (Table Index) Year of commissioning the asset.

profile_name.description: Name of profile, used to determine data inside the DuckDB table

profile_type.description: Type of profile, used to determine DuckDB table with source profile

assets_rep_periods_partitions._description: Defines temporal resolution (partitioning) for assets within representative periods.

asset.description: (Table Index) Name of the asset. Same as the one in the `asset` table.

milestone_year.description: (Table Index) Year of investment and operation decisions in the optimization.

partition.description: Partition or temporal resolution in the representative periods. For example, for a `uniform` specification `1` is hourly, `2` is every two hours.

rep_period.description: (Table Index) Number of the representative period

specification.description: Partition (or temporal resolution) specification in the representative periods.

assets_timeframe_partitions._description: Defines temporal resolution (partitioning) for assets within the timeframe (e.g., annual periods).

asset.description: (Table Index) Name of the asset. Same as the one in the `asset` table.

milestone_year.description: (Table Index) Year of investment and operation decisions in the optimization.

partition.description: Partition or temporal resolution in the timeframe. For example, if a period is equivalent to a day then for a `uniform` specification `1` is per day, `2` is every two days.

specification.description: Partition (or temporal resolution) specification in the timeframe.

assets_timeframe_profiles._description: Links timeseries profiles to assets, based on the milestone year and stochastic scenario.

asset.description: (Table Index) Name of the asset. Same as the one in the `asset` table.

milestone_year.description: (Table Index) Year of investment and operation decisions in the optimization.

profile_name.description: Name of profile, used to determine data inside the DuckDB table

profile_type.description: Type of profile, used to determine DuckDB table with source profile

flow._description: Flow of energy or materials between assets, either as a direct connection or transport (such as a network).

capacity.description: Capacity for one unit of the transport flow (is therefore multiplied by number of existing plus invested number of transport assets).

carrier.description: Energy carrier or material, such as electricity, gas, or water.

discount_rate.description: Discount rate for the annuity calculation (e.g. 0.05 is 5%).

economic_lifetime.description: Economic lifetime of the transport asset (such as a pipeline) for the annuity calculation.

from_asset.description: (Table Index) Name of the asset where the flow originates. Same as the one in the `asset` table.

investment_integer.description: Whether investment decisions will use integer variables.

is_transport.description: #TODO CLARIFY Whether a transport flow or not. Transport flows can have capacity constraints, can have flows in both directions, and can be invested in. (Such as a pipeline or a network.)

technical_lifetime.description: How long the flow operational (capacity is considered), starting from the commission year.

to_asset.description: (Table Index) Name of the asset where the flow terminates. Same as the one in the `asset` table.

flow_both._description: Flow parameters that are dependent on BOTH the milestone and commissioning years.

commission_year.description: (Table Index) Year of commissioning the transport asset.

decommissionable.description: Whether the transport asset can be decommissioned or not.

from_asset.description: (Table Index) Name of the asset where the flow originates. Same as the one in the `asset` table.

initial_export_units.description: #TODO WHEN? Number of existing units in `from_asset` -> `to_asset` direction

initial_import_units.description: Number of existing units in `to_asset` -> `from_asset` direction

milestone_year.description: (Table Index) Year of investment and operation decisions in the optimization.

to_asset.description: (Table Index) Name of the asset where the flow terminates. Same as the one in the `asset` table.

flow_commission._description: Flow parameters that are dependent on the commissioning year.

capacity_coefficient.description: Coefficient for the flow in the maximum capacity constraints.

commission_year.description: (Table Index) Year of commissioning the transport asset.

conversion_coefficient.description: Multiplier between the flow and the conversion balance constraint of the asset.

fixed_cost.description: Fixed annual cost for the transport asset capacity.

from_asset.description: (Table Index) Name of the asset where the flow originates. Same as the one in the `asset` table.

investment_cost.description: Investment cost for the transport asset capacity.

investment_limit.description: Maximum capacity for the transport asset investment. If the initial value is null, empty, or missing, it will be no limit.

to_asset.description: (Table Index) Name of the asset where the flow terminates. Same as the one in the `asset` table.

flow_milestone._description: Flow parameters that are dependent on the milestone year.

commodity_price.unit_of_measure: CUR/MWh or other units depending on the commodity

dc_opf.description: Whether a flow uses direct current optimal power flow (dc-opf) constraints or not. This method only applies to transport flows.

from_asset.description: (Table Index) Name of the asset where the flow originates. Same as the one in the `asset` table.

investable.description: Whether there is an investment variable created for the asset or not.

milestone_year.description: (Table Index) Year of investment and operation decisions in the optimization.

to_asset.description: (Table Index) Name of the asset where the flow terminates. Same as the one in the `asset` table.

flows_profiles._description: Links time-series profiles (availability, commodity price) to flows.

from_asset.description: #TODO CORRECT OR IS IT PROFILE_NAME (Table Index) Name of the asset where the flow originates. Same as the one in the `asset` table.

milestone_year.description: (Table Index) Year of investment and operation decisions in the optimization.

profile_name.description: Name of profile, used to determine data inside the DuckDB table

profile_type.description: Type of profile, used to determine DuckDB table with source profile

to_asset.description: (Table Index) Name of the asset where the flow terminates. Same as the one in the `asset` table.

flows_relationships._description: Defines linear relationships and coupling constraints between pairs of flows, i.e. for multi-in multi-out conversions.

constant.description: Constant `C` in `flow_1 {==;>=;<=} C + A x flow_2` relationship constraint

flow_1_from_asset.description: (Table Index) Name of the `from_asset` of the `flow_1` in `flow_1 {==;>=;<=} C + A x flow_2` relationship constraint. Same as the one in the `asset` table.

flow_1_to_asset.description: (Table Index) Name of the `to_asset` of the `flow_1` in `flow_1 {==;>=;<=} C + A x flow_2` relationship constraint. Same as the one in the `asset` table.

flow_2_from_asset.description: (Table Index) Name of the `from_asset` of the `flow_2` in `flow_1 {==;>=;<=} C + A x flow_2` relationship constraint. Same as the one in the `asset` table.

flow_2_to_asset.description: (Table Index) Name of the `to_asset` of the `flow_2` in `flow_1 {==;>=;<=} C + A x flow_2` relationship constraint. Same as the one in the `asset` table.

milestone_year.description: (Table Index) Year of investment and operation decisions in the optimization.

ratio.description: Ratio `A` in `flow_1 {==;>=;<=} C + A x flow_2` relationship constraint

sense.description: Is the sense in `flow_1 {==;>=;<=} C + A x flow_2` relationship constraint, equal to, greater than or less than.

flows_rep_periods_partitions._description: #TODO CONTINUE HERE Defines temporal resolution (partitioning) for flows within representative periods.

from_asset.description: Name of the asset. Same as the one in the `asset` table.

partition.description: Partition or temporal resolution in the representative periods. For example, for a `uniform` specification `1` is hourly, `2` is every two hours.

specification.description: Partition (or temporal resolution) specification in the representative periods.

to_asset.description: Name of the asset. Same as the one in the `asset` table.

group_asset._description: Defines investment groups with aggregate capacity constraints.

constraint_sense.description: Whether the expression in the group constraint is equal to, greater than, or less than, the right-hand-side.

invest_method.description: true -> activate group constraints; false -> no group investment constraints

milestone_year.description: Year of investment and operation decisions in the optimization.

group_asset_membership._description: Defines which assets belong to which investment groups with contribution coefficients.

asset.description: One of the assets in this group.

coefficient.description: Coefficient of the investment variable corresponding to this asset.

group_name.description: Investment group to which the asset belongs to.

milestone_year.description: Year of investment and operation decisions in the optimization.

model_parameters._description: Global optimization model parameters including discount rates and risk aversion settings.

discount_year.description: The model discount year. The `discount_year` is calculated in the code as the minimum value between the input value in the table `model_parameters` and the minimum of all milestone years (in the table `rep_periods_data`).

power_system_base.description: The power system base in MVA.

risk_aversion_confidence_level_alpha.description: The confidence level that the system costs will not exceed the Value at Risk (VaR).

risk_aversion_weight_lambda.description: The risk aversion weight (between 0 and 1) for the mean-variance objective function. If 0, the objective function is the expected cost; if 1, the objective function is the variance of the cost; if between 0 and 1, the objective function is a weighted sum of the expected cost and the variance of the cost.

profiles_rep_periods._description: Time-series profile values for representative periods used in constraints and expressions.

profiles_timeframe._description: Time-series profile values for timeframe periods used in constraints and expressions.

rep_periods_data._description: Metadata for each representative period including timestep count and resolution.

rep_periods_mapping._description: Maps periods to representative periods with scenario weights for stochastic optimization.

stochastic_scenario._description: Defines stochastic scenarios with probabilities for Monte Carlo or robust optimization.

description.description: Description of the stochastic scenario. e.g., 'Weather year 1982'.

timeframe_data._description: Metadata for each period in the timeframe (e.g., annual periods) including timestep count.

milestone_year.description: Year of investment and operation decisions in the optimization.

num_timesteps.description: Number of timesteps of the representative period.
